title: aconitum variegatum subsp. oenipontanum
intro: Aconitum variegatum subsp. oenipontanum, also known as Oenipontan Monk's Hood or Alpine Monk's Hood, is a subspecies of the Aconitum variegatum plant, a perennial flowering plant native to the European Alps. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain, due to the presence of the alkaloids aconitine and delphinine. The health benefits of Aconitum variegatum subsp. oenipontanum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic and arthritic symptoms, and even treat certain types of cancer. Aconitum variegatum subsp. oenipontanum can be prepared as a tincture, powder, or infusion for medicinal use, but caution is advised due to its toxicity.
